## Source: ghsa-malware (f2fd0abe38f0402b7a29351ece5900432142958df800db5a9f9beebf5272fd57)
## Source: ossf-package-analysis (ad6c1ebcf6bfd3fd771aad2e5628f388059a1675ca82b4196ede826dd02e05bf)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'turboghas-client' @ 99.99.99 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.

cwes.description: The product contains code that appears to be malicious in nature.
